query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A person stands on a city sidewalk at night beside a street with moving vehicles. The individual wears a dark top and light-colored pants. A stream of vapor rises from a metal grate in the sidewalk near the person's feet. Several cars with headlights and taillights are visible on the road. Streetlights line the sidewalk, and buildings, a construction barrier, and a large utility box appear along the curb.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A motion-blurred nighttime photograph of a person standing on a sidewalk next to a street with moving traffic, vapor rising from a grate at their feet. Extreme motion blur softens and streaks the figure, vehicles, and surroundings into indistinct shapes. A sickly yellow-orange sodium vapor color cast washes over the entire scene. Streetlights and car headlights blow out into bright, unrecoverable highlights against deep crushed shadows, contributing to an atmosphere of urban dread and unease.
